rationale: The "relaxing bus-clearing puzzle" hook is fundamentally misaligned with Crowd City's energetic, competitive swarm-and-chase loop — promising relaxation would mis-set expectations and tank post-install retention/IPM quality. Visuals (top-down grid puzzle, stylus interaction, muted blues) clash with Crowd City's bright primary-color crowds and 3D city chase action; only the broad casual hypercasual audience overlaps. Do not adapt this archetype as-is; if testing the "satisfaction" emotional pitch, rebuild around a swarm-growth ASMR angle (crowd snowballing, consuming rivals) rather than puzzle-clearing.
